title: Grounds
description: Discover multiple layers beneath the earth and ascend to the mystical Aether above. Explore vast biomes, uncover hidden treasures, and encounter unique creatures. Adventure awaits in every direction, offering endless exploration and discovery.
body:
**Embark on an adventure of depth and height — quite literally!**

This modpack immerses you in a world that expands not just outward, but vertically. Dig layer by layer into the underground to discover hidden realms filled with rare resources, ancient relics, and perilous enemies — or ascend into the mystical Aether, a celestial dimension of floating islands and magical wonders.

Whether you’re descending into darkness or exploring floating islands in the sky, your journey unfolds in every direction.

This modpack features a rich selection of mods, including:

* **Deeper and Darker**: Venture into mysterious biomes deep beneath the surface and face unique underground threats.
* **The Aether**: Explore a heavenly realm full of floating terrain, rare resources, and mystical creatures.
* **Create**: Construct elaborate machinery and automation systems to bring your world to life.
* **Artifacts**: Discover and equip powerful items that grant special abilities.
* **Curios**: Unlock additional equipment slots for greater customization.
* **Alex’s Mobs**: Encounter an array of new creatures, both realistic and fantastical.
* **Ice and Fire**: Face off against mythical beasts, dragons, and more.
* **Ambient Sounds**: Immerse yourself in a dynamic audio environment.
* **BetterF3**: Upgrade your debug screen with clearer and more detailed information.
* **Waystones**: Set teleportation points to travel your world with ease.
* **Storage Drawers**: Organize your items efficiently with expandable storage solutions.

And many more!

With over 100 carefully selected mods, this modpack offers a deep and layered gameplay experience filled with exploration, adventure, and progression — both above and below ground.

## Credits

* **Illage and Spillage**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage)

## Recommended

* **Whimzee's Better Jungle Temple**: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/whimzee-s-better-jungle-temple/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/whimzee-s-better-jungle-temple/)
